design_philosophy: A sophisticated, high-end dark mode chat interface that nods to WhatsApp's familiarity (soft bubbles, online indicators) but strips away the generic 'app' feel. Uses deep obsidian blacks, sharp glassmorphism, and a vibrant 'Wasabi Green' accent for user actions to create a premium, trustworthy AI receptionist experience.

layout_and_spacing.app_container: max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] flex flex-col relative bg-[#0A0A0A] overflow-hidden md:shadow-2xl md:border-x border-white/5
layout_and_spacing.header: h-16 flex items-center px-4 gap-3 sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/5
layout_and_spacing.chat_area: flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 flex flex-col gap-6 scroll-smooth
layout_and_spacing.input_area: p-4 sticky bottom-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/5 pb-safe flex gap-2 relative

chat_bubble_ai.classes: max-w-[85%] bg-[#1A1A1A] text-[#F3F4F6] px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm border border-white/5 shadow-sm leading-relaxed text-[15px]
chat_bubble_ai.instructions: Use Figtree font. Add a subtle 1px border. Render Markdown if necessary, but keep spacing tight.

chat_bubble_user.classes: max-w-[85%] bg-[#22C55E] text-black px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm self-end shadow-sm leading-relaxed text-[15px] font-medium
chat_bubble_user.instructions: High contrast text (black on Wasabi green). No border needed.

info_card_widget.classes: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-3 my-2 shadow-lg overflow-hidden
info_card_widget.instructions: Act as a 'rich message' sent by the AI. Contains business hours, location, and a mini map or image.

input_field.classes: w-full bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-white/10 rounded-full pl-5 pr-12 py-3 text-white placeholder-gray-500 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#22C55E] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#22C55E] transition-all text-[15px]
input_field.instructions: Pill shaped, comfortable tap target. Hide default browser outlines.

send_button.classes: absolute right-5 top-5 h-9 w-9 bg-[#22C55E] hover:bg-[#16A34A] text-black rounded-full flex items-center justify-center transition-transform active:scale-95
send_button.instructions: Use Lucide ArrowUp icon. Needs clear hover/active states. Positioned absolutely inside the relative input wrapper.

header_avatar.classes: w-10 h-10 rounded-full object-cover border border-white/10
header_avatar.instructions: Image must be perfectly round with a very subtle white border.

online_indicator.instructions: Place next to the 'Online' text under the business name in the header.

motion_and_interaction.message_entrance: Framer motion: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10, scale: 0.95 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3, ease: 'easeOut' }}
motion_and_interaction.typing_indicator: Three dots bouncing sequentially. Use CSS keyframes or framer-motion.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: All interactive elements must have a distinct hover state. Accent buttons darken slightly.
motion_and_interaction.focus_states: Input field glows with the Wasabi Green accent when focused.

images.description: Minimalist 'M' cafe logo, acts as the business profile picture in the header.
Modern shopfront image used inside the AI's introductory info card to build trust.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text inside Wasabi green bubbles is #000000 for WCAG AA compliance. Gray AI text must be at least #D1D5DB.
accessibility_and_testing.aria_labels: All icon-only buttons (like Send) must have aria-label='Send message'.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize the project with pure Tailwind + Lucide Icons + Framer Motion. Shadcn is optional for this UI as custom bubbles are easier built with raw Tailwind.
2. DO NOT use generic fonts like Inter. Use 'Outfit' for the header and 'Figtree' for the chat bubbles. Import them from Google Fonts in index.html.

3. Wrap the main layout in a max-w-md container centered on the screen. The background of the outer body/html should be #000000 or #050505, and the chat container itself #0A0A0A to distinguish it on desktop.
4. Implement the chat state as an array of messages. Include a 'typing' state for the AI.

5. The AI's first message should be a standard text greeting, immediately followed by an 'Info Card Widget' (a custom component rendering the business image, location, and hours) to satisfy the 'Basic info section' requirement.

6. Build a mock flow to capture lead data (Name, Phone, Intent) progressively in the chat. Do not build a separate form page. When user types, add their message, then simulate an AI reply asking for the next piece of info.
7. Strictly adhere to the color hex codes provided. DO NOT use default Tailwind blue or slate.
8. Use the exact provided Unsplash image URLs for the avatar and info card.
9. Add the required data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
